title: Track input tokens and total token throughput in TPS plugin
problem: The post_api_request hook receives input_tokens in the usage dict but the plugin ignores them. No visibility into prompt size or total token throughput.
goal: Add input token tracking to enable complete token visibility: input, output, and total tokens per call and per session.
success_criteria: summary_line() shows total tokens when available

risks.risk: Changing _tps_snapshot structure may affect status bar
risks.mitigation: Additive only — new keys, existing keys unchanged

risks.risk: input_tokens may be 0 or missing for some providers
risks.mitigation: Same guard as output_tokens — check > 0 before recording
